entries.title: Continuous Household Survey Heat and Insulation Results 2025/26
entries.summary: The Continuous Household Survey (CHS) Heat and Insulation report presents statistics on household heating and insulation in Northern Ireland. The publication includes information on primary and secondary heating methods, heating fuels, insulation measures, heating controls, and consumer behaviour relating to the purchase of heating oil. The report provides insights into household energy use and energy efficiency and supports the monitoring of trends over time. Results are based on data collected through the 2025/26 Continuous Household Survey. These statistics are used by government departments, local authorities, researchers, industry representatives, and the wider public to inform policy development, monitor trends in domestic energy use, and support evidence-based decision making.

entries.summary: This is a quarterly release of information on the testing, licensing and enforcement/compliance activities of the Driver and Vehicle Agency in Northern Ireland.

entries.title: Deaths Registered in Northern Ireland - Week ending 18 September 2026
entries.summary: Tables showing deaths registered in Northern Ireland in 2026, up to and including 18 September 2026.

entries.title: Mental Health and Learning Disability Inpatient Tables 2024/25
entries.summary: Presents information on inpatients and compulsory admissions under the Mental Health (NI) Order 1986 in mental health and learning disability hospitals.

entries.title: Personnel Statistics for the Northern Ireland Civil Service 2026
entries.summary:
Information on staffing numbers in the Northern Ireland Civil Service 2025/26. Subject to review, these statistics will be released between July and August 2026.

This publication will be updated.
Personnel Statistics for the Northern Ireland Civil Service was reviewed in 2025 and will be streamlined and improved to meet user needs. Further updates will be provided in due course.

entries.title: Employment in the Northern Ireland Civil Service - 1 July 2026
entries.summary:
This bulletin provides details of NICS staff numbers on a quarterly basis and provides comparisons with the previous quarter, the wider public sector.                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                          
Subject to review, these statistics will be released between August and September 2026.

This publication will be updated.
The Employment in the Northern Ireland Civil Service was reviewed in 2025 and will be streamlined and improved to meet user needs. Further updates will be provided in due course.

entries.title: Complaints and Compliments Received by HSC Trusts in Northern Ireland for 2025/26
entries.summary: Summary of information collected on complaint issues, by subject and programme of care (POC), and compliments received by each of the six HSC trusts in Northern Ireland.

entries.title: Statistics on community care for adults in Northern Ireland 2024/25
entries.summary: This report presents information on a range of community activity gathered from health and social care (HSC) trusts including contacts with HSC trusts, care packages in effect, meals on wheels services, residential and nursing accommodation and day care registrations.

entries.title: Domiciliary Care Services for Adults in Northern Ireland (2025)
entries.summary: This report summarises information collected from health and social care trusts on adults receiving domiciliary care services from the statutory and independent sectors during a survey week in September. It details information on the numbers of clients receiving domiciliary care, visits, contact hours and intensive domiciliary care provision.

entries.title: Sickness Absence in the Northern Ireland Civil Service 2025/26
entries.summary: This report provides an analysis of sickness absence data for staff in the Northern Ireland Civil Service over the 2025/26 financial year.

entries.title: Northern Ireland waiting time statistics: inpatient and day case waiting times June 2026
entries.summary: Information is detailed below on the number of patients waiting, and length of time waiting, for ordinary and day case admissions at health and social care (HSC) trusts in Northern Ireland. The publications report on the performance of HSC trusts against the ministerial waiting time target in Northern Ireland.

entries.title: Quarterly Sickness Absence in the Northern Ireland Civil Service: April 2026 - June 2026
entries.summary:
This provides an analysis of all sickness absence in the Northern Ireland Civil Service between 1 April 2026 and 30 June 2026.  

This publication is under review.

The content of the Quarterly Sickness report is to be reviewed in 2026 to ensure it meets user needs. Further updates will be provided in due course.
